formulas.name: Speed of Electromagnetic Waves
formulas.variables: c = speed of electromagnetic wave, λ = wavelength, ν = frequency

formulas.name: Wavelength of Electromagnetic Waves
formulas.variables: λ = wavelength, c = speed of electromagnetic wave, ν = frequency

formulas.name: Frequency of Electromagnetic Waves
formulas.variables: ν = frequency, c = speed of electromagnetic wave, λ = wavelength

formulas.name: Energy of Electromagnetic Waves
formulas.variables: E = energy, h = Planck's constant, ν = frequency

formulas.name: Momentum of Electromagnetic Waves
formulas.variables: p = momentum, h = Planck's constant, λ = wavelength

formulas.name: Intensity of Electromagnetic Waves
formulas.variables: I = intensity, E = energy, t = time

formulas.name: Electromagnetic Spectrum
formulas.variables: Different types of electromagnetic waves, their frequencies, and wavelengths
formulas.notes: List of electromagnetic waves in order of increasing frequency and decreasing wavelength
